string-array.name: changelog
string-array.item: Fixed Vinted
Added Campfire, Crunchyroll, Cube Out 3D :Jam Puzzle, Dave, Entergy, Ford, Gear Truck, Highline Fast, Juice King, T-Life

Added GameHub, Where Winds Meet, Means TV, Seeneva, wiser_home, step_tracker_pedometer, opentune, assistant_app_launcher, butternut, royal_bank, waterfox, tui, proton_authenticator, blink, mbna, automation, wowcam, heliboard, natwest, showly
Improved quality of windy
Fixed windy, barclays, chase, roborock

Added AutoElevate, Follow, Hudu, Informed Delivery, NinjaOne, Ninja Remote, Pokémon Sleep, UniFi Protect, Expo Go, Morphe, Insigno, LibreFind, Pocket Code, 32steps, Life360, B and N NOOK, Squad Busters, CSB_Mobile, Paltopia, Pokémon HOME, Vested Soft, Afterpay, Affirm
Fixed UPS, USPS Mobile, Pokémon GO, Termux:Widget
Updated SimpMusic
Thanks a lot to @github:Champ0999 who contributed some of the icons of this release.
Added Heartopia, Tesla
Fixed Thunderbird
Added mBank
Fixed Mobilny USOS, Mullvad VPN, Thunderbird
Added Audio Connect, GeForce NOW, my Santa Maria, Now Playing
Updated Facer, Voice, Tux Paint, Lockscreen, EFootball
Added PDF Viewer, Golem.de, Morph Reader, SotN, Telehealth
Fixed StreetComplete

Added Linkwarden, QRAlarm, WG Tunnel, Readeck App, DNSNet, Pinkt, CoMaps, thankyou, Daily You, Karakeep, Eidetic, Qalculate!, Linkdy, MoneyBuster, Mindful Notifier, Topolino, musicplayer, OnTime, Calibre Web Companion, Track and Graph, Tack, Prayer Book
Fixed k_9_mail, translator, rethink, hanping_cantonese, hanping_chinese_pro
Thanks a lot to @github:desk7 who made the new icons of this release and to @github:alisonatwork who contributed the fixes in this release.
Added AWV-Isar-Inn Abfall-App, PeerTube, Finch, Sdui, Filen, Ente Photos
Made Youtube icons consistent
Added Alza, Anytime CZ, Comet, Mammouth, Manus, Vlny, 433 Football, Blip, My DIGI, My Games
Added Santander, Apple TV, Neutron Player, Qobuz
Added MEO Go, my MEO, Wallpapers by IDTR, Weather
Added My Pixel, WTF
Fixed proton vpn
Added Library, Tools, Goods Sorting, RDR
Fixed Cowsay, Drawpile, SuperTuxKart, Klett Lernen, Proton Mail
Added Cowsay, Drawpile, SuperTuxKart
Fixed Mediamarkt
Added Old School RuneScape, My Game Collection, PS Family, UniPatcher, Octopi Launcher, MyFuelLog2, Presseschau
Updated and fixed MediaMarkt
Fixed Ente Auth
See older changelogs on https://github.com/MiepHD/cuscon/releases
